name: Delhi Manali Tour by Volvo
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Manali with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: : Pick up from Manali Bus stand & proceed to hotel after refreshments proceed to
itinerary.description: : Pick up from Manali Bus stand & proceed to hotel after refreshments proceed to a half day city tour visiting Hadimba Temple, Manu Temple, Vashisht Temple and Tibetan Monastery.  Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.description: : Solang Valley day trip:  After breakfast go for a full day excursion to Solang valley visit Solang Valley with its rolling meadows, ski slopes and paragliding activities ( Own cost), Overnight stay at the hotel. * Optional Tour with extra paid: Atul tunel, Sissu, Rohtang pas

itinerary.description: : Kullu – Manikaran day trip: After early breakfast, a full day excursion visiting Manikaran ( Hot water springs) en-route Kas0l and Kullu – Shamshi (A Famous industry for Kullu Shawl), boat ride (own cost). Overnight stay at the hotel.
